description: Multi-depth (0→1→2), 2 fanouts, 2 parent iterations, 9 model calls. Exercises state/lineage/completion planes: batched dispatch with schema (ChildResult), single dispatch without schema (ReasoningOutput default), and grandchild dispatch at depth 2. Requires RLM_MAX_CONCURRENT_CHILDREN=1 for deterministic ordering.

responses.note: Parent depth-0, turn 0: execute_code defining ChildResult, dispatching llm_query_batched(K=2, output_schema=ChildResult)

args.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel
class ChildResult(BaseModel):
    answer: str
    confidence: float

state = _rlm_state
print(f"[D0_T0] iteration_count={state.get('iteration_count')}")
print(f"[D0_T0] current_depth={state.get('current_depth')}")
print(f"[D0_T0] should_stop={state.get('should_stop')}")
print(f"[D0_T0] _rlm_depth={state.get('_rlm_depth')}")
print(f"[D0_T0] _rlm_fanout_idx={state.get('_rlm_fanout_idx')}")
print(f"[D0_T0] _rlm_agent_name={state.get('_rlm_agent_name')}")

prompts = ["Analyze item A in depth", "Analyze item B briefly"]
results = llm_query_batched(prompts, output_schema=ChildResult)
print(f"[D0_T0] DISPATCH num_results={len(results)}")
for i, r in enumerate(results):
    print(f"[D0_T0] CHILD_{i} error={r.error} parsed={r.parsed}")

responses.note: Child d1 f0 reasoning: execute_code dispatching llm_query to depth 2

args.code:
state = _rlm_state
print(f"[D1_F0] current_depth={state.get('current_depth')}")
print(f"[D1_F0] iteration_count={state.get('iteration_count')}")
print(f"[D1_F0] _rlm_depth={state.get('_rlm_depth')}")
print(f"[D1_F0] _rlm_agent_name={state.get('_rlm_agent_name')}")

deep_result = llm_query("Perform deep analysis of item A")
print(f"[D1_F0] D2_RESULT error={deep_result.error}")
print(f"[D1_F0] D2_RESULT text={str(deep_result)[:80]}")
if deep_result.parsed:
    print(f"[D1_F0] D2_PARSED final_answer={deep_result.parsed.get('final_answer', 'N/A')}")

responses.note: Grandchild d2 f0: immediate set_model_response with default ReasoningOutput

args.final_answer: Deep analysis of item A: strong performance metrics with 95% accuracy
args.reasoning_summary: Analyzed item A using multi-factor evaluation

responses.note: Child d1 f0: set_model_response with ChildResult schema (terminates child)

args.answer: Item A analyzed in depth with deep sub-analysis confirming strong metrics

responses.note: Child d1 f1 reasoning: execute_code with local analysis (no sub-dispatch)

args.code:
state = _rlm_state
print(f"[D1_F1] current_depth={state.get('current_depth')}")
print(f"[D1_F1] iteration_count={state.get('iteration_count')}")
print(f"[D1_F1] _rlm_depth={state.get('_rlm_depth')}")
print(f"[D1_F1] _rlm_fanout_idx={state.get('_rlm_fanout_idx')}")
print(f"[D1_F1] _rlm_agent_name={state.get('_rlm_agent_name')}")
analysis = "Item B brief assessment: moderate quality"
print(f"[D1_F1] analysis={analysis}")

responses.note: Child d1 f1: set_model_response with ChildResult schema (terminates child)

args.answer: Item B brief assessment shows moderate quality

responses.note: Parent depth-0, turn 1: execute_code dispatching llm_query (single, no schema)

args.code:
state = _rlm_state
print(f"[D0_T1] iteration_count={state.get('iteration_count')}")
print(f"[D0_T1] last_repl_result_present={'last_repl_result' in state}")
print(f"[D0_T1] _rlm_depth={state.get('_rlm_depth')}")
print(f"[D0_T1] _rlm_agent_name={state.get('_rlm_agent_name')}")

summary_result = llm_query("Summarize all findings from the analysis")
print(f"[D0_T1] SUMMARY error={summary_result.error}")
print(f"[D0_T1] SUMMARY text={str(summary_result)[:80]}")
if summary_result.parsed:
    print(f"[D0_T1] SUMMARY_PARSED final_answer={summary_result.parsed.get('final_answer', 'N/A')}")

responses.note: Summary child d1: immediate set_model_response with default ReasoningOutput (no schema override)

args.final_answer: Summary: Items A and B analyzed. A shows strong metrics (95%), B shows moderate quality.
args.reasoning_summary: Combined findings from depth-1 and depth-2 analyses

responses.note: Parent depth-0: set_model_response with ReasoningOutput (terminates parent)

args.final_answer: Multi-depth analysis complete: items A and B analyzed across 3 depth levels with high confidence
args.reasoning_summary: Orchestrated multi-depth recursive analysis with batched dispatch
